titleStmt.title: Tei Gi gehi — Lower Stele of Zheng Xi (leaf 1) (rubbing)
鄭道昭・鄭義下碑1（拓本）

msIdentifier.repository: Japan Search (ジャパンサーチ) — national aggregator

msContents.summary: Ink rubbing of a Zheng Daozhao 鄭道昭 (Tei Dōshō) Daoist cliff inscription: Tei Gi gehi — Lower Stele of Zheng Xi (leaf 1). Holding institution: Daito Bunka University (libdaito). 鄭羲下碑 (here written 鄭義下碑) is the canonical Yunfengshan stele by Zheng Daozhao commemorating his father Zheng Xi. Daito holds a 10-leaf rubbing set (DAITOD00269-00278); leaves 2-10 are sibling records 001091558/561/562/565/566/569/570/573/574 under the same DAITOD ids. Leaf-1 image verified HTTP 200 image/jpeg.

support.objectType: 拓片 · ink rubbing on paper

origin.origDate: Northern Wei, Yongping 4 (北魏・永平4年/511)

bibl.ref: Japan Search (ジャパンサーチ) — national aggregator — record

revisionDesc.change: Zheng Daozhao 鄭道昭 (Tei Dōshō) Daoist cliff inscription; harvested from Japan Search (ジャパンサーチ) — national aggregator via the Epiwen Japanese-repository workflow. Image served live.

div.p: Ink rubbing — see the linked record/manifest.
